positive: A stylized, vibrant abstract floral tapestry featuring interconnected monstera leaves, tropical hibiscus blooms, and delicate curling vines. The design should have a strong, high-contrast silhouette against a clean background, using a deep jewel-tone color palette (emerald green, sapphire blue, magenta, and gold accents). The composition must be centrally arranged and highly repeatable, suitable for large format textile printing. Art Deco stained-glass inspired elements blended with modern botanical illustration style. Vector art, clean lines, symmetry, maximalist composition, perfect for screen printing.
